creator: brix@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I can not reproduce this problem on the tinderboxes, so I'm a bit at
a loss here. Please submit the output of the following commands:

# cd /usr/ports/www/ikiwiki/
# make configure
# ls -l work/ikiwiki/
# df -h /usr/ports/

Regards,
Brix
-- 
Henrik Brix Andersen <brix@FreeBSD.org>
